stun.h(3) Library Functions Manual stun.h(3)

NAME

stun.h

SYNOPSIS

Macros

STUN Protocol Constants



#define STUN_DEFAULT_PORT 3478
Standard STUN port (RFC 5389). #define STUN_TLS_DEFAULT_PORT 5349
STUN over TLS port (RFC 5389). #define STUN_MAX_URL_LEN 64
Maximum STUN URL length.

Functions


struct __attribute__ ((packed))
STUN server configuration. int stun_servers_parse (const char *csv_servers, const char *default_csv, stun_server_t *out_servers, int max_count)
Parse comma-separated STUN server URLs into stun_server_t array.

Variables


stun_server_t
